import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; function Home({ showSidebar, sidebarGender, setShowSidebar, setSidebarGender }) { const subCategoryItems = [ 'Top', 'Bottoms', 'Bag', 'Accessories', 'Shoes' ]; return (
{/* Video Section */}
{/* Video Background */} {/* Dark overlay */}
{/* Text overlay - no background bar */}
{/* Season text */}

ONLY RAW MATERIAL ALLOWED.

{/* Browse collection link */} BROWSE COLLECTION
{/* Sliding Sidebar Overlay */} {showSidebar && (
setShowSidebar(false)} /> )} {/* Sidebar Panel */}
{/* Close Button */} {/* Sidebar Title - Just Gender Name */}

{sidebarGender}

{/* View All Button */} setShowSidebar(false)} style={{ fontSize: '13px', fontFamily: 'Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif', fontWeight: '300', letterSpacing: '0.3px', color: '#000', padding: '16px 0', cursor: 'pointer', borderBottom: '1px solid #e5e5e5', marginBottom: '30px', transition: 'color 0.3s', display: 'block', textDecoration: 'none' }} onMouseEnter={(e) => e.target.style.color = '#999'} onMouseLeave={(e) => e.target.style.color = '#000'} > View All {/* Subcategories - 5 items */}
{subCategoryItems.map((item) => ( setShowSidebar(false)} style={{ fontSize: '13px', fontFamily: 'Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif', fontWeight: '300', letterSpacing: '0.3px', color: '#000', padding: '16px 0', cursor: 'pointer', borderBottom: '1px solid #e5e5e5', transition: 'color 0.3s', display: 'block', textDecoration: 'none' }} onMouseEnter={(e) => e.target.style.color = '#999'} onMouseLeave={(e) => e.target.style.color = '#000'} > {item} ))}
{/* Description at bottom */}
Discover our latest premium {sidebarGender.toLowerCase()} collection crafted from the finest materials.

COLLECTION 2

); } export default Home;
